---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work the way it should
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

### Description

A clear, concise description of the bug.

### Reproduction

Minimal code that triggers the bug:

```python
from helakit import validate_nic
# ...
```

### Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

### Actual behaviour

What actually happened (include the full traceback if any).

### Environment

- helakit version:
- Python version:
- Operating system:
